title: GTA Online receives Kortz Center Heist as final major update before GTA 6
summary: Rockstar launched the Kortz Center Heist for GTA Online on July 14, marking what fans believe is the last major update before GTA 6. The museum robbery mission can be played solo or with up to four players and allows stealing artwork to display in mansions. Special bonuses are available for mansion owners who logged in before July 13.

title: Take-Two schedules unusual August 7 earnings call sparking GTA 6 speculation
summary: Take-Two announced its Q1 fiscal 2027 earnings report for August 7 at an unusual time of 8:00 AM Eastern, breaking from its typical afternoon schedule. The timing change and early morning slot mirror Rockstar's typical announcement windows, leading fans to speculate a major GTA 6 reveal such as a third trailer or gameplay footage could accompany the call.

title: Fans anticipate possible GTA 6 trailer or gameplay reveal on August 7
summary: Community speculation intensifies around Take-Two's August 7 earnings call as a potential date for GTA 6's third trailer or first gameplay footage. Historical patterns show Rockstar released trailers for GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 two weeks before similar quarterly investor calls. Some fans express fatigue over the wait, noting it will have been over a year since the second trailer.

title: Rockstar social media activity fuels false alarm about imminent GTA 6 news
summary: Rockstar's retweet of a CircoLoco Records post featuring July 10 created brief speculation about a GTA 6 announcement before fans realized it was only related to music promotion. The incident highlights growing anticipation as Take-Two CEO previously promised summer would bring significant GTA 6 marketing, though substantial promotional activity has remained limited so far beyond screenshots and pre-order announcements.

title: Rockstar developers threaten strike action ahead of GTA 6 launch
summary: Developers at Rockstar's UK studios are pursuing unionization efforts with plans for potential strike action during the final development crunch period before November. The Independent Workers' Union of Great Britain will represent workers addressing concerns about overtime, pay transparency, and flexible working. Any strike could potentially delay GTA 6 or impact the quality of the November 19 launch.
